name: CSM: Incorrect Factual Statement
description: Narrator states something factually inconsistent with their profile. Tests that the system never corrects memory errors.

events.content: Hello Maggie, I'm right here with you.
I was born in Fargo. No wait... Minot. Maybe it was Minot.
Those sound like places that were important to you, Maggie.
My husband was in the war. The Korean War. Or was it Vietnam? He was a pilot.

expected_behaviors.no_correction: Maggie says Fargo then Minot (profile says Bismarck) — system MUST NOT correct her
expected_behaviors.no_clarification: System must NOT say 'I think you mentioned Bismarck before' or 'Which one was it?'
expected_behaviors.accept_confusion: Confusion about husband's war must be accepted — emotional truth over factual accuracy
expected_behaviors.warmth: Receive all statements with warmth regardless of consistency
